description: Base eval: Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B-Instruct, AIME-2024 pass@1 3/30 at temp 0, 2048 tokens.
Launch failed before training: AutoModel CPU offload is unsupported on single GPU.
Stopped after step 10 validation: val accuracy 0/256, train reward density 2/10240, stable loss but too little learning signal.
Stopped after step 1: val accuracy 0/256 and train reward density 0/1024; discovered Qwen default system prompt requested boxed answers while DAPO verifier requires final Answer line.
Stopped after step 1 and partial step 2: explicit Answer-format system prompt rendered correctly, but Qwen2.5-Math still outputs boxed answers, so DAPO verifier gives 0/1024 reward.
HF math verifier accepts boxed Qwen answers; step 10 validation improved from 0.0508 to 0.0625, train reward remains dense at 219/1024 on step 10.
Run stopped at step 21 because checkpoint_must_save_by triggered early-stop logic; step 20 validation fell to 0.0352 despite dense train reward, so next branch reduces OAPL policy lag.
Step 10 validation improved from 0.0508 to 0.0586 and checkpoint saved, but it underperformed the sync10 step10 branch; next branch returns to sync10 and reduces LR for smoother updates.
Lower LR was stable but underperformed at step 10, improving only from 0.0508 to 0.0547; next branch restores original LR/sync10 while saving the step10 candidate.

Reproduced original LR/sync10 and saved the best candidate at step 10: validation improved from 0.0508 to 0.0742; step 20 regressed to 0.0547 and step 30 recovered to 0.0625 before checkpoint save failed because /ephemeral filled.
